description: Extended collaborative coding scenarios with 3-4 specialized agents

scenarios.name: Distributed System Design
scenarios.description: Design a distributed cache system with multiple agents
scenarios.initial_context: Build a distributed cache supporting: get/set/delete, TTL, LRU eviction, replication
assertions: Consistent hashing or similar for distribution

scenarios.description: Refactor legacy Python 2 code to modern Python 3

scenarios.description: Optimize slow code with profiling and fixes

scenarios.name: API Versioning
scenarios.description: Add versioning to existing API without breaking clients
